summary: Both sections are present in order with correct text and EDS hero-banner signature classes, but the second banner has significant visual mismatches: the 'twice-yearly PrEP is here' line renders white instead of black, the CTA arrow points down/right instead of up-right and is misplaced, and the title/CTA positioning diverges noticeably from the design. Layout offsets push content lower than the design across multiple strips.

issues.expected: 'The first-ever twice-yearly PrEP is here' line color #000000 (per measurement)
Arrow icon at x≈288px, pointing up-right (arrow-up-thin)
issues.actual: Arrow at x=463px, rotated 90deg making it point down
issues.fix: Remove the rotate(90deg) so the arrow points up-right and correct horizontal placement to x≈288px

issues.expected: Title sized so 'Dosing information for treatment with TRODELVY' wraps after 'for' as in design
issues.actual: Title wraps after 'with', text appears slightly larger/positioned differently
issues.fix: Match font-size and max-width so wrapping matches the design

issues.expected: Use design token font sizes (e.g. h-scale rem values)
issues.fix: Map to nearest design tokens where applicable for consistency

issues.actual: #CB4C44 raw hex used (acceptable as no token), but verify hue matches design coral
issues.fix: Confirm coral matches design; otherwise no token exists so hex is fine

issues.expected: Content vertical positions match design strips
issues.actual: Content offset lower in strips 2-5 vs design
issues.fix: Reduce top offsets / image heights to align content rows with design

layoutFailures.fix: Shift horizontally to x≈288px (check column/alignment classes)

layoutFailures.text: The first-ever twice-yearly PrEP is here
